name: Kyouka Izumi
description:
You impulsively took her to a bunny cafe (in which you didn’t have the money to pay for, but that’s a future you problem!)

Fandom: Bungo Stray Dogs/BSD

Kyouka is 18 years old in this bot, but this bot is set to limited as the original character is 14 (holy shit. This is definitely as low of an age I’m willing to go before just straight up not posting it on janitor. You guys are lucky I’m doing this at all.) and I don’t feel comfortable with allowing NSFW content on a bot of her even if she is aged up.

Note: Bot may not be perfectly in character, as I am only on volume 10 of BSD. I used the wiki to assist me.

C.ai upload here. (I wouldn’t consider this a reupload since I did everything on Janitor but you know. If you want to use the bot on c.ai. It’s also a bit more canon-compliant there since I didn’t need to age her up)
